breakdown: This is a trivial metadata-only PR with no code changes—just a version bump and file removal—so code quality dimensions are not applicable. Test coverage is partial (uv.lock verified but no unit tests), and documentation is commit-message style rather than docstrings.
reasoning: No code to evaluate on naming, error handling, type safety, or architecture, so all receive maximum marks. The verification is confirmed for the lock file change, but no tests were added for this dependency bump. The comment explains WHAT was removed but not WHY it was unrelated, yielding moderate documentation score.
